absorption: Son bardaki -5 delta ile dusuk hacim (6 vol) ve bid=6>ask=1, fiyatin 64391'de tutuluyor = ASK absorption + CVD -2.8M negatif + session sell dominant (0.56 ratio) = kurumsal satis baskisi
dom_observation: bid_ask_ratio=1.1 sifira yakinda (ask baskisi), ask_depth=63 vs bid_depth=69 = satis artiyor, dom dengesiz
htf_alignment: 5m=BEAR, 15m=BULL, 1h=BULL (2/3 bullish ama 5m BEAR + current bar BEAR = kisa vadede satis baskisi hakimiyet)
session_bias: buy_sell_ratio=0.56 (<0.8 threshold) + session delta=-2.8M + sell_volume=6.3M >> buy_volume=3.5M = gunun baskin trendi BEARISH, satis guclu
reasoning: CVD divergence + possible absorption + negatif session delta + VAH ustu kabul yok + ask agir DOM + 5m BEAR bias = kurumsal short aksyon tespit, VAL seviyesine dogru satis momentum
